/usr/bin/ar qc libmakesdr-settings-model-extra.a "CMakeFiles/makesdr-settings-model-extra.dir/src/ActiveBandSettings.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-settings-model-extra.dir/src/BandCategoryList.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-settings-model-extra.dir/src/BandList.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-settings-model-extra.dir/src/BandSettings.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-settings-model-extra.dir/src/BandSettingsCache.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-settings-model-extra.dir/src/ModeList.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-settings-model-extra.dir/src/PipelineSettings.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/makesdr-settings-model-extra.dir/src/RadioSettingsEx.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libmakesdr-settings-model-extra.a
